sentence_reviews.text: Game-playing, control & simulation agents integrates Model-based reinforcement learning as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate_references metadata only; no quoted passages or line-level excerpts supplied. Candidate sources: ref_aima: Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach, 4th ed. (2021); ref_dreamer: Mastering Diverse Domains through World Models (2023); ref_rlbook: Reinforcement Learning: An Introduction, 2nd ed.
